mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.item_id, r.material_id, r.origin, r.quantity, m.name AS materialName, m.unit AS unit, m.is_powder AS isPowder FROM recipes r INNER JOIN materials m ON r.material_id = m.id WHERE r.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY r.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipes( item_id, material_id, origin, quantity) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{detail.materialId}, #{detail.origin}, #{detail.quantity})
